description: Global forex/indices/commodities prop firm. 2-step evaluation (Challenge + Verification). No time limit.

rules.description: Maximum daily loss is 5% of INITIAL account balance (not previous day balance). Recalculated at midnight CE(S)T using: max(account_balance_at_midnight, initial_balance) - 5% * initial_balance. Includes closed P/L, floating P/L, commissions, and swaps. Equity-based.
rules.calculation_note: The daily loss limit is always 5% of INITIAL capital. However, if your balance at midnight is higher than initial, the floor is calculated from that higher balance. Example: $100K account, balance at midnight = $105K, floor = $105K - $5K = $100K (not $95K).

rules.description: Account equity must not drop below 90% of INITIAL account balance at any time. This is static (non-trailing) — the floor never moves. Example: $100K account, equity floor = $90K forever.
Must trade on at least 4 calendar days during each phase.
No time limit. Traders can take as long as needed to reach profit target.

On standard accounts, cannot open or close trades within 2 minutes before and after high-impact news events (as defined by FTMO's economic calendar). Applies to standard accounts only, not swing accounts.
